brief: MMPipe v2 — X post announcement graphic
voice: Felix — Mother London CCO: playful, editorial, Scarry-comfortable. Technical wit without trying too hard.
prompt: A cinematic cross-section of a glowing Unix pipe system rendered like a 1970s instructional diagram crossed with a neon-lit server room. The pipe is a large translucent industrial tube running left-to-right across the frame. Inside it: a JPEG photo of a dog, a PNG icon, and a short video clip are tumbling through like luggage on a conveyor belt — each wrapped in a glowing MMP/1.0 header tag like a luggage label. On the left entry point, a macOS Finder file-picker dialog floats above the pipe mouth (labeled 'mmpick'). In the center, a Kitty terminal renders the dog photo inline as a tiny glowing rectangle on the pipe wall (labeled 'mmkitty'). On the right exit, clean green UTF-8 text streams out into a vintage terminal screen where 'grep red' is waiting. A small full-screen TUI window floats above the exit, labeled 'mmtui', showing three glowing panels. The overall palette is deep charcoal and near-black with neon green data glows, warm amber pipe metal, and a single red notification dot (winking Easter egg). Mood: confident, a little cheeky, genuinely useful.

composition.layout: left-to-right pipeline flow with labeled stations
composition.focal_point: the pipe cross-section center, where mmkitty renders the image inline
composition.depth: slight three-quarter isometric angle, not fully flat
composition.negative_space: dark charcoal top-right corner for text overlay (the X post copy goes here)

palette.data_glow: #39ff14 — neon green (matches mmpipe logo mm color)
palette.text_label_bg: #1a1a2e — dark navy for MMP header tags
palette.accent_red: #ff3b30 — single red notification dot, used once only

elements_to_include: MMP/1.0 header tag visible on at least one media item in the pipe (like a luggage label)
The word 'mmpick' in a pill label above the left pipe mouth
The word 'mmkitty' in a pill label at the center station
A tiny dog photo rendering inline on the pipe wall (Kitty terminal aesthetic — pixel-edged)
The word 'mmtui' floating above the right section with a three-panel window chrome
The exit end of the pipe shows clean green text streaming out — grep-style
Subtle Ken Thompson ghost portrait watermark in the dark background (very faint, tasteful)
elements_to_avoid: Any AI model branding visible in the scene
Cluttered type — labels only, no paragraphs
The word 'ChatGPT' or any competitor name
easter_eggs: The dog in the pipe is a Shiba Inu (Doge nod)
One of the MMP header tags reads 'Content-Type: image/good-boy'
The grep command at the exit reads: grep -i 'red' | # found: 1 match

output_spec.safe_zone: keep right 30% of frame clear of key elements for text overlay
